subject: A polished golden mechanical device or vessel floats amid purple and crimson chaos, connected by tubes and cables, crackling with blue lightning
description: A large, abstract mechanical object dominates a vertical composition. The object is rendered in polished gold and bronze, shaped somewhat like a rounded pod or helmet with visible vents and plating. Thick cables or hoses connect it to other components above and below frame. Blue electrical energy arcs and crackles across the object's surface and into the surrounding space. The background is a roiling mass of purple, magenta, and deep crimson — suggesting chaotic magical energy, a planar rift, or the interior of a Phyrexian furnace. There are no figures; the art is purely object and environment. The portrait-oriented composition and bottom-heavy design suggest the device is descending or suspended.
foreground: polished golden mechanical pod or vessel with vents
background: swirling purple-crimson magical energy with blue lightning
